title: Couverture LDAP exhaustive (tous contrôles + extensions + AD)
description: Implémenter TOUS les contrôles LDAP standard pour battre Softerra: PagedResults (RFC 2696), Server-Side Sort (RFC 2891), VLV (RFC 2891), PreRead/PostRead (RFC 4527), Assertion (RFC 4528), PasswordPolicy (draft-behera), Subentries (RFC 3672), ManageDsaIT, ProxyAuthorization (RFC 4370), SyncRepl (RFC 4533). Extensions: StartTLS, ModifyPassword (RFC 3062), WhoAmI (RFC 4532), Cancel. AD-specific: range= modifier, deep paged search, ntSecurityDescriptor parsing, GUID/SID display, userAccountControl bit decoder, lastLogonTimestamp conversion.
